title: 2) Practitioner
text:
As the practitioner, we should care for ourselves, especially when we remove needles
from  patients.  You  remove  at  least  20-25  needles  each  session.  It  is  not  hard  to  lose
concentration and poke your ﬁngertips with the removed needles. Protect yourself with a
mask and gloves. Additionally, you should be aware of any contagious diseases like HIV,
hepatitis B/C, tuberculosis, etc., that the patient has. The CNT should be followed strictly.
